project_name: Miguel Torres — standalone_residential — Los Cabos, BCS
scope_summary: Full architectural services for a 216 sqm, 3-bedroom standalone residence with pool in Los Cabos, BCS. Includes 6 phases: conceptual design through construction administration. Architecture fee: $30,000 USD in 3 milestone payments.

budget_detail.note: Construction costs are contracted directly between client and contractor. Architecture fee is separate and fixed per the payment schedule above.
